Jakarta Persistence API v4.0.0-SNAPSHOT
  1. jakarta.persistence
  2. jakarta.persistence

Uses of Package
jakarta.persistence

Packages that use jakarta.persistence
Package
Description
jakarta.persistence
Jakarta Persistence is the API for the management for persistence and object/relational mapping.
jakarta.persistence.criteria
Jakarta Persistence Criteria API
jakarta.persistence.metamodel
Jakarta Persistence Metamodel API
jakarta.persistence.query
 
jakarta.persistence.spi
SPI for Jakarta Persistence providers
jakarta.persistence.sql
 
  • Classes in jakarta.persistence used by jakarta.persistence
    Class
    Description
    AccessType
    Used with the Access annotation to specify an access type to be applied to an entity class, mapped superclass, or embeddable class, or to a specific attribute of such a class.
    AttributeConverter
    Interface implemented by custom attribute converters.
    AttributeNode
    Represents an attribute node of an entity graph.
    Cache
    Interface used to interact with the second-level cache.
    CacheRetrieveMode
    Specifies how the EntityManager interacts with the second-level cache when data is read from the database via the EntityManager.find(Class, Object, Map) methods and execution of queries.
    CacheStoreMode
    Specifies how the EntityManager interacts with the second-level cache when data is read from the database and when data is written to the database.
    CascadeType
    Defines the set of cascadable operations that are propagated to the associated entity.
    ConnectionConsumer
    An executable action which makes use of a native database connection.
    ConnectionFunction
    A function which makes use of a native database connection to compute a result.
    ConstraintMode
    Used to control the application of a constraint.
    DiscriminatorType
    Defines supported types of the discriminator column.
    EntityAgent
    Provides entity operations that are performed independently of a persistence context.
    EntityGraph
    An entity graph is a template that captures the boundaries of an operation or query.
    EntityHandler
    Declares operations common to EntityManager and EntityAgent.
    EntityListenerRegistration
    Represents the registration of an entity lifecycle event listener with the EntityManagerFactory.
    EntityManager
    Interface used to interact with the persistence context.
    EntityManagerFactory
    Interface used to interact with the persistence unit, and to create new instances of EntityManager and EntityAgent.
    EntityTransaction
    Interface used to control transactions involving resource-local entity managers and entity agents.
    EnumType
    Enumerates available options for mapping enumerated types.
    FetchType
    Defines policies for fetching data from the database.
    FindOption
    An option influencing the behavior of EntityHandler.find(Class, Object), EntityHandler.findMultiple(Class, List, FindOption...), EntityHandler.get(Class, Object), or EntityHandler.getMultiple(Class, List, FindOption...).
    FlushModeType
    Enumerates flush modes recognized by the EntityManager.
    GenerationType
    Enumerates the defined primary key generation strategies.
    Graph
    Declares operations common to EntityGraph and Subgraph, most importantly, operations for adding and removing attribute nodes and for creating subgraphs.
    InheritanceType
    Enumerates the options for mapping entity inheritance.
    LockModeType
    Enumerates the kinds of optimistic or pessimistic lock which may be obtained on an entity instance.
    LockOption
    An option influencing the behavior of EntityManager.lock(Object, LockModeType).
    Parameter
    Represents a parameter of a query.
    ParameterMode
    Specifies the mode of a parameter of a stored procedure query.
    Persistence.BeanManagementProperties
    Properties used to control the integration with CDI.
    Persistence.CacheProperties
    Properties used to configure the second-level cache.
    Persistence.ConnectionProperties
    Properties used to connect to the database via JDBC in Java SE.
    Persistence.DatabaseProperties
    Properties used to specify the database platform when JDBC metadata is not available.
    Persistence.JdbcProperties
    Properties used to optimize the interaction with JDBC.
    Persistence.SchemaManagementProperties
    Properties used to control the schema management tooling.
    Persistence.ValidationProperties
    Properties used to control the integration with Bean Validation.
    PersistenceConfiguration
    Represents a configuration of a persistence unit, allowing programmatic creation of an EntityManagerFactory.
    PersistenceContextType
    Specifies the lifecycle of a container-managed persistence context in a Jakarta EE container environment.
    PersistenceException
    Thrown by the persistence provider when a problem occurs.
    PersistenceUnitTransactionType
    Enumerates the possible approaches to transaction management in Jakarta Persistence.
    PersistenceUnitUtil
    Utility interface between the application and the persistence provider managing the persistence unit.
    PersistenceUtil
    Utility interface between the application and the persistence provider(s).
    PessimisticLockScope
    Controls how a pessimistic lock applied to an entity affects associated collections and relationships.
    Query
    Declares common operations for controlling the execution of statements and queries written in the Jakarta Persistence query language or in native SQL.
    Reference
    A reference to a named statement or query declared via the NamedQuery or NamedNativeQuery annotations, or using StaticQuery or StaticNativeQuery.
    RefreshOption
    An option influencing the behavior of EntityManager.refresh(Object).
    SchemaManagementAction
    Represents an action that can be performed by the schema management tooling.
    SchemaManager
    Allows programmatic schema creation, schema validation, data cleanup, and data loading, and schema cleanup for entities belonging to a certain persistence unit.
    SchemaValidationException
    Thrown when schema validation fails.
    SharedCacheMode
    Enumerates policies which control how the provider determines if an entity type is eligible for storage in the second-level cache.
    Statement
    Interface used to control the execution of executable statements.
    StatementReference
    A reference to an executable named statement for an operation that returns a row count.
    StoredProcedureQuery
    Interface used to control execution of a stored procedure query.
    Subgraph
    This type represents a subgraph for an attribute node that corresponds to a managed type.
    SynchronizationType
    Specifies whether the persistence context associated with an EntityManager is always automatically synchronized with the current transaction.
    TemporalType
    Deprecated.
    Newly written code should use the date/time types defined in java.time.
    Timeout
    Specifies a timeout for a database request.
    TupleElement
    The TupleElement interface defines an element that is returned in a query result tuple.
    TypedQuery
    Interface used to control the execution of typed queries.
    TypedQueryReference
    A reference to a typed named query declared via the NamedQuery or NamedNativeQuery annotations, or using StaticQuery or StaticNativeQuery.
    ValidationMode
    The validation mode to be used by the provider for the persistence unit.
  • Classes in jakarta.persistence used by jakarta.persistence.criteria
    Class
    Description
    AttributeConverter
    Interface implemented by custom attribute converters.
    Parameter
    Represents a parameter of a query.
    Tuple
    Interface for extracting the elements of a query result tuple.
    TupleElement
    The TupleElement interface defines an element that is returned in a query result tuple.
  • Classes in jakarta.persistence used by jakarta.persistence.metamodel
    Class
    Description
    EntityGraph
    An entity graph is a template that captures the boundaries of an operation or query.
  • Classes in jakarta.persistence used by jakarta.persistence.query
    Class
    Description
    CacheRetrieveMode
    Specifies how the EntityManager interacts with the second-level cache when data is read from the database via the EntityManager.find(Class, Object, Map) methods and execution of queries.
    CacheStoreMode
    Specifies how the EntityManager interacts with the second-level cache when data is read from the database and when data is written to the database.
    LockModeType
    Enumerates the kinds of optimistic or pessimistic lock which may be obtained on an entity instance.
    PessimisticLockScope
    Controls how a pessimistic lock applied to an entity affects associated collections and relationships.
    Reference
    A reference to a named statement or query declared via the NamedQuery or NamedNativeQuery annotations, or using StaticQuery or StaticNativeQuery.
    StatementReference
    A reference to an executable named statement for an operation that returns a row count.
    Timeout
    Specifies a timeout for a database request.
    TypedQueryReference
    A reference to a typed named query declared via the NamedQuery or NamedNativeQuery annotations, or using StaticQuery or StaticNativeQuery.
  • Classes in jakarta.persistence used by jakarta.persistence.spi
    Class
    Description
    EntityManagerFactory
    Interface used to interact with the persistence unit, and to create new instances of EntityManager and EntityAgent.
    FetchType
    Defines policies for fetching data from the database.
    PersistenceConfiguration
    Represents a configuration of a persistence unit, allowing programmatic creation of an EntityManagerFactory.
    PersistenceUnitTransactionType
    Enumerates the possible approaches to transaction management in Jakarta Persistence.
    SharedCacheMode
    Enumerates policies which control how the provider determines if an entity type is eligible for storage in the second-level cache.
    ValidationMode
    The validation mode to be used by the provider for the persistence unit.
  • Classes in jakarta.persistence used by jakarta.persistence.sql
    Class
    Description
    LockModeType
    Enumerates the kinds of optimistic or pessimistic lock which may be obtained on an entity instance.
    Tuple
    Interface for extracting the elements of a query result tuple.
    TupleElement
    The TupleElement interface defines an element that is returned in a query result tuple.
